message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker with new entries

Update the beads issue tracker (49 insertions, 2 deletions) to capture
newly filed issues from recent development work on the TUI chrome
rendering, message view enhancements, and launcher improvements. These
entries track remaining follow-up work, edge cases discovered during
the recent fix(tui) and feat(tui) rounds, and forward-looking feature
requests surfaced during review.

Changes:
- .beads/issues.jsonl: New tracker entries for open issues and
  follow-up work items identified during recent development cycles

Stray ephemeral files (--graph-root.svg, numbered output files,
named output files, test artifacts) intentionally left untracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
